text.content:
Blood Sorcery Rituals — Level 1

Blood Walk

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 1 hour

Ingredients: A taste of the subject's blood

By tasting the blood of another Kindred, the caster can determine their generation, clan, sire, and any blood bonds. Provides a vision of the subject's lineage.

Clinging of the Insect

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 10 minutes

Ingredients: A living spider, consumed

Allows the caster to climb and cling to walls and ceilings like a spider for the remainder of the night.

Craft Bloodstone

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 3 hours

Ingredients: A small smooth pebble and a point of vitae

Enchants a small pebble to glow when within a certain distance of Kindred vitae. Useful for detecting vampires or hidden blood stores.

Wake with Evening's Freshness

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 15 minutes

Ingredients: The caster's vitae spread around the resting place

Allows the caster to awaken at any sign of danger during the day without the need for a Humanity roll, rising one hour before sunset if undisturbed.

Communicate with Kindred Sire

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 30 minutes

Ingredients: An object once belonging to the sire

Opens a telepathic channel between the caster and their sire, allowing communication over any distance for a single night. Both parties must be willing.

Defence of the Sacred Haven

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Int + Blood Sorcery | Time: 1 hour

Ingredients: Vitae painted along all window frames and door thresholds

Wards a single room against sunlight. Any windows or openings are mystically sealed against daylight, though the room becomes pitch black. Lasts until the next sunset.
